title: Fully Optimized
description: Includes everything you need, both optimization and utility.
body:
Fully Optimized is a simple mod pack that includes all the essentials of good optimization and handy utility.

**Performance**
Fully Optimized has good performance thanks to the best optimizing mods on fabric.

**Utility**
Fully optimized includes our favorite mods to simplify the game, such as Zoomify, Gamma Utils (Fullbright) and others.
